sections.markdown:
- Activity: Morning Run
- Started: 2025-04-16 06:29
- Distance: 5 km
- Moving time: 28:49
- Elapsed time: 28:57
- Elevation gain: 95.4 m
- Average heart rate: 166.9 bpm
- Max heart rate: 186 bpm
- Average watts: 209.2 W
- Average speed: 10.5 km/h
- Apple Health recorded `3` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `170.7 bpm`, ranging from `161.2` to `177.0 bpm`.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `152.8 spm`, with a working range of `120.0` to `163.0 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `161.4 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `148.5 spm` (-12.9 spm), which suggests some late turnover fade.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:44 /km` across `5.021 km` in `28:49` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:36 /km` and second-half pace was `5:54 /km` (+18 s/km), so pace faded meaningfully in the back half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `166.9 bpm` average and `186 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `160.3 bpm` in the first half and `172.7 bpm` in the second (+12.4 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `28:49` out of `28:57` elapsed (99.5%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `4` stop segments and `0.4%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `99.4 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `22.2 m` and `67.0 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `42.4 m` in the first half and `57.0 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed later.
